title: Find Minimum in Max-Heap
description: Given a max-heap of n integers (1-indexed array), find the minimum element. The minimum is always a leaf. First leaf is at index floor(n/2)+1.
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: n integers (max-heap array, 1-indexed).

botCodes.code:
n=int(input())
a=list(map(int,input().split()))
# leaves start at index n//2 (0-indexed: n//2 to n-1)
print(min(a[n//2:]))
let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let a=Array.init(n+1)(fun _->Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) in let m=ref a.(n/2+1) in for i=n/2+2 to n do if a.(i)< !m then m:=a.(i) done;Printf.printf"%d\n" !m
